metadata.name: Generate Price Quote for Large Order

description: A salesperson needs to generate a formal price quote for a customer requesting a large, non-standard order volume.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the product, and enter the requested volume (e.g., 20 metric tons).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and product details.

nodes.task_description: Use the pricing engine to calculate a price, which should automatically apply a volume discount based on pre-set rules.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a price that is lower per-unit than the standard list price.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formal quote PDF document with a 30-day validity period and email it to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and sends the quote.
